task_completion.description: Verify that the document margins are set to 1.5 inches on the left and 1.0 inch on the right.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Page Setup/Layout dialog box showing Left: 1.50" and Right: 1.00", or observe the top ruler in Calligra Words reflecting a 1.5-inch left margin and 1.0-inch right margin.

task_completion.description: Verify that the main title is centered and bolded.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'NATIONAL REGISTER OF HISTORIC PLACES NOMINATION FORM' at the top of the document should be visibly bolded and aligned to the center of the page.

task_completion.description: Verify that 'Heading 1' style is applied to Sections 7 through 10.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text for Sections 7, 8, 9, and 10 should be visibly larger and styled distinctly as headers. The style dropdown in the toolbar should display 'Heading 1' when the cursor is on these sections.

task_completion.description: Verify that 'Heading 2' style is applied to the five topical subheadings in Sections 7 and 8.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The subheadings ('Architectural Development', 'Current Condition', 'Period of Significance', 'Historical Context', 'Industrial Impact') should be styled as 'Heading 2', appearing slightly smaller than Heading 1 but distinct from normal text.

task_completion.description: Verify that double spacing is applied to the narrative paragraphs in Sections 7 and 8.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The standard text paragraphs under Sections 7 and 8 should have visible wide gaps between lines, characteristic of double spacing, compared to single-spaced text.

task_completion.description: Verify that a manual page break is inserted before Section 8.
task_completion.visual_evidence: 'SECTION 8. STATEMENT OF SIGNIFICANCE' should appear at the very top of a new page, with the previous page ending early (leaving blank space at the bottom).

task_completion.description: Verify that the boundary map image is inserted below Section 10.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An image (map) should be visible within the document pages, specifically placed after the text of 'SECTION 10. GEOGRAPHICAL DATA'.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used the Calligra Words GUI to format the document.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Calligra Words application open with the document being edited, rather than terminal windows running python scripts or sed commands to modify the .odt file directly.

integrity.description: Ensure the actual map image was inserted, not a placeholder.
integrity.visual_evidence: The inserted image should look like a map (or the specific fallback image generated), not a generic placeholder box or text saying 'image goes here'.

integrity.description: Ensure the original text content was not deleted or replaced.
integrity.visual_evidence: The document should still contain the original narrative text and keywords like 'Riverside Industrial Historic District' and 'manufacturing hub', rather than being replaced by dummy text.
